content.text:
Respond to the question:
Please share a time in the Seven! game when you faced a relatively challenging choice. How did you make your judgment then?
回答問題：
請分享你在Seven!遊戲中覺得較具挑戰的選擇情境，你當時是如何做出判斷的？
content.assessment_standard:
10	A challenging choice I faced in the Seven! game was deciding whether to play a high-value card early or save it for later. I was torn because playing it early could secure immediate points, but saving it might win a bigger round later. I made my judgment by observing how many high cards had already been played by others, and decided to hold onto it.|I found it quite challenging to choose which player to target with my action card. I didn't want to ruin my friendship, but I also wanted to win. I analyzed the current scores and targeted the player who was clearly in the lead. I explained my logic to them with a smile, ensuring it remained just friendly competition.|Deciding whether to bluff or tell the truth was a challenging choice. I noticed that other players were playing very cautiously. I judged that a confident bluff would trick them into passing their turns. I maintained a straight face and played my card, and the risk successfully paid off.
9	A challenging choice I faced was deciding whether to play a high-value card early or save it. I was torn because playing early secures points, but saving it might win later. I made my judgment by observing how many high cards were played by others, and decided to hold it.|I found it quite challenging to choose which player to target with my action card. I didn't want to ruin friendship, but wanted to win. I analyzed scores and targeted the player in the lead. I explained my logic with a smile for friendly competition.|Deciding whether to bluff or tell the truth was a challenging choice. I noticed other players playing cautiously. I judged that a confident bluff would trick them. I maintained a straight face and played my card, and the risk paid off.
8	A challenging choice I face is decide to play high-value card early or save it. Playing early get points, but save it win later. I make judgment by observe how many high cards played by others, and I decide to keep it.|I find it quite challenging to choose which player to target with action card. I want to win but not ruin friendship. I analyze scores and target the leading player. I explain my logic with smile so it is friendly.|Decide to bluff or tell truth is challenging choice. I notice other players play cautious. I judge a confident bluff will trick them. I keep straight face and play card, risk pay off.
7	Challenge choice is play high card early or save it. Early get point, save win later. I look how many high card played by other, and decide keep it.|Challenging to choose player to target. Want win not ruin friend. I look score and target leader. I tell him logic with smile for friendly.|Decide bluff or truth is challenging. Other player cautious. I think bluff trick them. I make straight face and play, it success.
6	Challenge choice play high card early or save. Early point save win later. Look high card play by other decide keep.|Challenging choose player target. Want win not ruin friend. Look score target leader. Tell logic smile friendly.|Decide bluff truth challenging. Other player cautious. Think bluff trick. Straight face play success.
5	Challenge play high card save. Early point save later. Look high card decide keep.|Challenging choose player target. Win not ruin friend. Look score target leader.|Decide bluff truth. Other cautious. Bluff trick straight face.
4	Challenge high card. Point later. Look keep.|Choose player target. Win friend. Target leader.|Bluff truth. Cautious. Trick.
3	Challenge card. Keep.|Target leader. Friend.|Bluff truth. Trick.
2	Challenge. Card.|Target. Leader.|Bluff. Trick.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question:
Please describe a recent real-life situation where you had to compare different options (paths, methods, choices). How did you finally choose?
回答問題：
請描述最近一次你在生活中需要比較不同方案(路徑、方法、選項)的情況，你最後是怎麼選擇的？
content.assessment_standard:
10	Recently, I had to choose between attending a friend's birthday party or studying for an important exam. Both options were important to me. I finally chose to study for the exam because my academic performance has long-term consequences. However, I made sure to visit my friend briefly with a gift earlier in the day to show I cared.|I had to decide whether to join the basketball club or the debate club. I compared the two by listing the pros and cons of each, considering my schedule and personal interests. I chose the debate club because I wanted to improve my public speaking skills, which I felt was a more valuable long-term asset for me.|When buying a new phone, I had to compare several models based on price, camera quality, and battery life. I spent hours reading reviews and watching comparison videos. I finally selected a mid-range phone that offered the best balance for my budget, realizing I didn't need the most expensive features.
9	Recently, I had to choose between a friend's birthday party or studying for an exam. Both options were important to me. I chose to study because my academic performance has long-term consequences. However, I visited my friend briefly with a gift earlier to show I cared.|I had to decide whether to join the basketball club or debate club. I compared the two by listing pros and cons, considering my schedule. I chose the debate club because I wanted to improve public speaking, which is a valuable long-term asset.|When buying a new phone, I compared models based on price, camera, and battery. I read reviews and watched videos. I finally selected a mid-range phone that offered the best balance for my budget, realizing I didn't need expensive features.
8	Recently, I have to choose between friend birthday party or study for exam. Both are important. I choose to study because academic performance has long-term consequence. But I visit my friend with gift earlier to show care.|I have to decide to join basketball club or debate club. I compare them by list pros and cons and my schedule. I choose debate club because I want improve public speaking, it is valuable asset.|When buy new phone, I compare models on price, camera and battery. I read reviews and watch video. I select a mid-range phone with best balance for budget, I do not need expensive features.
7	I need choose go friend party or study exam. Both important. I choose study because test has long consequence. But I visit friend with gift earlier to show care.|I decide join basketball or debate club. I compare pros cons and schedule. I choose debate because I want improve speak skill, it is good asset.|Buy new phone, I compare price camera battery. I read review and watch video. I choose mid-range phone for best balance budget, no need expensive.
6	Choose go friend party or study exam. Both important. Choose study test long consequence. Visit friend gift early show care.|Decide join basketball or debate club. Compare pros cons schedule. Choose debate want improve speak skill good asset.|Buy new phone compare price camera battery. Read review watch video. Choose mid-range phone balance budget no need expensive.
5	Choose party or study exam. Important. Choose study long consequence. Visit friend gift care.|Decide basketball debate club. Compare pros cons. Choose debate improve speak skill.|Buy phone compare price camera. Read review. Choose mid-range phone balance budget.
4	Choose party study. Important. Study consequence.|Decide basketball debate. Compare pros. Debate speak.|Buy phone compare. Read review. Mid-range balance.
3	Party study. Consequence.|Basketball debate. Pros.|Buy phone. Compare.
2	Study. Party.|Debate. Club.|Phone. Buy.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question:
When making decisions, which part do you feel you need to strengthen the most? (e.g., gathering information, analyzing pros and cons, predicting consequences, staying calm) Why?
回答問題：
做決策時，你覺得自己哪一部分最需要加強？(例如：找資訊、分析利弊、預測後果、保持冷靜) 為什麼？
content.assessment_standard:
10	When making decisions, I feel I most need to strengthen my ability to analyze pros and cons objectively. I often let my emotions or immediate desires dictate my choices, ignoring potential drawbacks. Taking a step back to logically evaluate the benefits and risks of each option would lead to much wiser decisions.|I need to improve my information gathering before making a choice. I tend to make snap judgments based on limited knowledge, which sometimes leads to regret. By taking the time to research and ask for advice from others, I can make more informed and confident decisions.|Predicting long-term consequences is the area I must strengthen. I usually only focus on how a decision will affect me today or tomorrow. Learning to think ahead and consider how my current choices will impact my future goals would prevent a lot of unnecessary stress.
9	When making decisions, I feel I need to strengthen my ability to analyze pros and cons objectively. I often let emotions dictate my choices, ignoring drawbacks. Logically evaluating the benefits and risks of each option would lead to wiser decisions.|I need to improve my information gathering before making a choice. I tend to make snap judgments based on limited knowledge, leading to regret. By taking time to research and ask for advice, I can make informed decisions.|Predicting long-term consequences is the area I must strengthen. I usually focus on how a decision affects me today. Learning to think ahead and consider how choices impact future goals would prevent stress.
8	When making decision, I need to strengthen analyze pros and cons objectively. I let emotion dictate my choice and ignore drawbacks. If I evaluate benefits and risks logical, it will lead to wise decision.|I need to improve information gathering before make choice. I make snap judgment on limited knowledge and feel regret. If I take time to research and ask advice, I make informed decision.|Predict long-term consequences is area I must strengthen. I only focus how decision affect me today. Learn to think ahead and consider future impact will prevent stress.
7	When make decision, I need strengthen analyze pros and cons. I let emotion make choice and ignore bad things. If I check benefit and risk logical, I make wise decision.|I need improve information gathering before choice. I judge fast with little knowledge and regret. I should take time research and ask advice for good decision.|Predict long-term consequence I must strengthen. I only think how it affect today. Think ahead and consider future impact prevent stress.
6	Make decision need strengthen analyze pros cons. Emotion make choice ignore bad thing. Check benefit risk logical make wise decision.|Improve information gathering before choice. Judge fast little knowledge regret. Take time research ask advice good decision.|Predict long-term consequence strengthen. Think affect today. Think ahead consider future prevent stress.
5	Strengthen analyze pros cons. Emotion choice ignore bad. Check benefit risk logical.|Improve information gathering. Judge fast little knowledge. Take time research advice.|Predict long-term consequence. Think affect today. Think ahead future prevent stress.
4	Strengthen analyze pros cons. Emotion choice. Logical.|Improve gather info. Judge fast. Research advice.|Predict consequence. Think today. Think ahead.
3	Analyze pros cons. Emotion.|Gather info. Research.|Predict consequence. Think.
2	Analyze. Emotion.|Gather. Info.|Predict. Consequence.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question:
Please share a time in the Seven! game when you regretted a choice you made. What caused your misjudgment (e.g., impatience, greed)?
回答問題：
請分享在Seven!遊戲中歷經選擇後卻感到後悔的情形，影響你判斷失準的原因為何？(例如：心急、貪心)
content.assessment_standard:
10	In the game, I deeply regretted being too greedy and trying to collect all the highest cards. My misjudgment was caused by greed and impatience. Because I refused to play smaller cards to defend myself, I ended up losing all my points in one turn. This taught me that being overly ambitious without a solid defense is a bad strategy.|I regretted playing my best card too early out of panic. I saw another player gaining points quickly, and my impatience made me waste my advantage. My judgment failed because I didn't stay calm and analyze the actual threat level. I learned that patience is crucial in strategy games.|I made a choice to bluff heavily, but I was immediately caught. I regretted it because I was overconfident and underestimated the other players' observation skills. My misjudgment stemmed from arrogance. Next time, I will be more cautious and read the room better before taking such big risks.
9	In the game, I regretted being greedy and trying to collect all the highest cards. My misjudgment was caused by greed and impatience. Because I refused to play smaller cards to defend, I lost all my points. This taught me that being overly ambitious is a bad strategy.|I regretted playing my best card too early out of panic. I saw another player gaining points, and impatience made me waste my advantage. My judgment failed because I didn't stay calm and analyze the threat. I learned patience is crucial.|I made a choice to bluff heavily, but was immediately caught. I regretted it because I was overconfident and underestimated other players. My misjudgment stemmed from arrogance. Next time, I will be cautious before taking big risks.
8	In the game, I regret being greedy and try to collect highest cards. My misjudgment is cause by greed and impatience. I refuse to play small cards to defend, so I lose all points. This teach me being too ambitious is bad strategy.|I regret playing my best card too early from panic. I see other player gain points, and impatience make me waste advantage. My judgment fail because I don't stay calm and analyze threat. I learn patience is important.|I make choice to bluff heavy, but I am caught. I regret because I am overconfident and underestimate players. My misjudgment is from arrogance. Next time I will be cautious before take big risks.
7	In game, I regret be greedy to collect high card. Misjudgment cause by greed and impatience. I not play small card defend, so I lose points. It teach me too ambitious is bad.|I regret play best card early for panic. See other gain point, impatience make me waste advantage. Judgment fail because not calm analyze threat. Patience is important.|I choose bluff heavy but I caught. Regret because overconfident underestimate player. Misjudgment from arrogance. Next time I cautious before big risk.
6	Regret be greedy collect high card. Misjudgment cause greed impatience. Not play small card defend lose point. Teach too ambitious bad.|Regret play best card early panic. See other gain point impatience waste advantage. Judgment fail not calm analyze. Patience important.|Choose bluff heavy caught. Regret overconfident underestimate player. Misjudgment arrogance. Next time cautious big risk.
5	Regret greedy collect high card. Cause greed impatience. Not defend lose point. Ambitious bad.|Regret play best card early panic. Impatience waste advantage. Judgment fail not calm. Patience important.|Bluff heavy caught. Regret overconfident underestimate. Misjudgment arrogance. Next time cautious.
4	Regret greedy collect card. Greed impatience. Lose point.|Regret play best early. Impatience panic. Not calm.|Bluff caught. Regret overconfident. Arrogance.
3	Regret greedy card. Greed.|Regret best early. Panic.|Bluff caught. Overconfident.
2	Regret greedy.|Regret panic.|Bluff caught.
1	(No response / Silence)

content.text:
Respond to the question:
How did observing other players' strategies or choices influence your own decision-making process in the Seven! game?
回答問題：
觀察其他玩家的策略或選擇，是如何影響你在Seven!遊戲中的決策過程的？
content.assessment_standard:
10	Observing other players' strategies heavily influenced my decisions. When I noticed one player consistently saving their best cards for the end, I changed my strategy to force them to use those cards earlier. By paying attention to their patterns, I was able to predict their moves and counter them effectively, rather than just focusing on my own hand.|I watched how another player successfully used bluffs to intimidate others. This inspired me to try a similar tactic when I had a weak hand. Observing their confident body language helped me mimic it, which made my own bluffing much more convincing and changed my entire approach to the game.|Seeing a player lose points because they were too aggressive made me adopt a more conservative strategy. I realized that playing it safe and accumulating small points steadily was better than risking it all. Learning from their mistakes directly shaped my decision-making process.
9	Observing other players' strategies influenced my decisions. When I noticed a player saving best cards for the end, I changed my strategy to force them to use those cards earlier. By paying attention to patterns, I predicted moves and countered them effectively.|I watched how another player successfully used bluffs to intimidate. This inspired me to try a similar tactic with a weak hand. Observing their confident body language helped me mimic it, making my bluffing convincing and changing my approach.|Seeing a player lose points because they were too aggressive made me adopt a conservative strategy. I realized playing safe and accumulating small points was better than risking it all. Learning from their mistakes shaped my decision-making.
8	Observe other players' strategy influence my decision. When I notice player save best cards for end, I change strategy to force them use cards early. Pay attention to pattern, I predict moves and counter them good.|I watch another player use bluff to intimidate successful. This inspire me try similar tactic with weak hand. Observe confident body language help me mimic it, make my bluff convince and change my approach.|See player lose points because they too aggressive make me adopt conservative strategy. I realize play safe and get small points better than risk all. Learn from mistake shape my decision-making.
7	Observe other player strategy influence decision. I notice player save best card end, I change strategy force them use early. Pay attention pattern, I predict move counter them.|I watch player use bluff intimidate success. Inspire me try tactic with weak hand. Observe confident body language help mimic, make bluff convince change approach.|See player lose point because too aggressive make me conservative strategy. Realize play safe get small point better than risk all. Learn mistake shape decision.
6	Observe player strategy influence decision. Notice save best card end, change strategy force use early. Pay attention pattern predict move counter.|Watch player bluff intimidate success. Inspire try tactic weak hand. Observe confident body language mimic, bluff convince change approach.|See player lose point too aggressive make conservative strategy. Realize play safe get small point better risk all. Learn mistake shape decision.
5	Observe strategy influence decision. Notice save best card, change strategy force early. Pay attention predict counter.|Watch bluff success. Inspire try weak hand. Observe confident mimic, bluff convince.|See lose point aggressive make conservative. Play safe get small point better. Learn mistake shape.
4	Observe strategy influence decision. Notice save card, force early.|Watch bluff success. Inspire weak hand. Mimic bluff.|See lose aggressive conservative. Play safe small point.
3	Observe strategy influence. Force early.|Watch bluff inspire. Mimic bluff.|Lose aggressive safe. Play safe.
2	Observe strategy.|Watch bluff.|Lose aggressive.
1	(No response / Silence)
